name: codex-hud
description: Real-time HUD for Codex CLI sessions: context, git, usage, tools, agents, and todos.

interface.shortDescription: Statusline-style HUD for Codex CLI sessions.
interface.longDescription: Codex HUD mirrors Claude HUD's session visibility for Codex: model, context, usage limits, git status, tool activity, agents, todos, and configurable layouts.
defaultPrompt: Show my current Codex HUD snapshot.
